headline: KNSL Q1 Estimates Beat on Strong Underwriting, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: Kinsale Q1 earnings beat estimates as EPS jumps 37.7% on strong premiums and underwriting gains, despite higher expenses and a dip in gross premiums.
